name: I-90 Travel Center Truck & Trailer Wash
description: Truck and trailer wash offered on-site at the I-90 Travel Center at I-90 Exit 332 in Mitchell.

name: Larry's I-90 Service
description: Auto and truck repair / tire shop just off I-90 Exit 332 in Mitchell, serving the Mitchell-Sioux Falls-Huron area.

name: Super 8 by Wyndham Mitchell
description: Hotel just off I-90 Exit 332 in Mitchell (across from the I-90 Travel Center) offering free parking with outdoor electrical outlets for trucks, buses and RVs, plus guest laundry.

name: Salem Rest Area
description: SDDOT interstate rest area on I-90 near mile marker 362 (both directions) between Salem and Emery, with restrooms and car/truck parking.

name: Hartford BP
description: Fuel stop at I-90 Exit 387 in Hartford with truck parking, a restaurant/deli, convenience store, laundromat and repair/tire service (Exit 387 interchange under reconstruction in 2025).

name: Love's Travel Stop #445
description: 24-hour Love's travel stop at I-90 Exit 399 (Cliff Ave) with diesel lanes, truck parking, showers, Subway, laundry, Love's Truck Care (tire/light mechanical), Wi-Fi and a CAT Scale.

name: CAT Scale at Love's Sioux Falls
description: Certified CAT Scale at I-90 Exit 399 (Cliff Ave) in Sioux Falls, co-located at Love's Travel Stop #445.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Sioux Falls
description: 24-hour Blue Beacon truck/trailer wash at I-90 Exit 399 (Cliff Ave) in Sioux Falls, adjacent to Love's; truck, trailer, reefer washout and RV washing.

name: Graham Tire - Sioux Falls North
description: Commercial/OTR and medium truck tire dealer on N Cliff Ave near I-90 Exit 399 in Sioux Falls, with medium commercial tires, retreads, ag and OTR tires.

name: Pomp's Tire Service - Sioux Falls
description: Commercial, farm and OTR truck tire dealer in north Sioux Falls near I-90, offering 24-hour commercial roadside tire assistance.

name: Flying J Travel Center #716
description: 24-hour Flying J at I-29 Exit 83, immediately north of the I-90/I-29 junction in Sioux Falls, with diesel, truck parking, showers, food, laundry, Wi-Fi, a secured lot and a CAT Scale.

name: CAT Scale at Flying J Sioux Falls
description: Certified CAT Scale at Flying J #716, I-29 Exit 83, just north of the I-90/I-29 junction in Sioux Falls.

name: Jim & Ron's Service
description: 24/7 light/medium/heavy-duty towing, recovery and truck repair near the I-90/I-29 junction in Sioux Falls.

name: Southeast Technical College - CDL Training
description: FMCSA/ELDT-registered Class A and Class B CDL training program in Sioux Falls, serving the I-90/I-29 corridor.

name: Coffee Cup Fuel Stop - Brandon
description: 24/7 Coffee Cup fuel stop at I-90 Exit 406 (SD-11) in Brandon with diesel satellite pumps, bulk DEF, overnight truck parking, showers, a deli/food, convenience store and a certified scale.

name: Valley Springs Welcome Center / Rest Area
description: SDDOT welcome center and rest area on I-90 near mile marker 412 (westbound) just inside SD near the Minnesota line by Valley Springs (Exit 410), with truck/trailer parking, 24-hour restrooms, RV dump and a dog area (SD 4-hour limit, no overnight parking).

name: Valley Springs Port of Entry
description: SDDOT / SD Highway Patrol port of entry and commercial vehicle inspection station on I-90 near the Minnesota state line at Valley Springs (Exit 410), co-located with the welcome center; e-screening sensors select trucks for inspection.
